creator: chris@officialunix.com
text:
This issue is still active on both 32bit and 64bit, but due to no interest
this issue can be cancelled, Not sure what else I can mention to fix this
issue. Install FreeBSD on a compaq with the same mouse returns same issue.
Might be hardware doubt it as it works 100% in WIndows, Linux.

Mouse works fine for a while but then the whole OS freezes, setup a serial
console reveals nothing as the OS freezes hard.

I have not tested this on the new USB stack, due to all the issues with it
atm in current like all new code which is perfectly normal, I will test it
once that cools down.
